groups.title: Accommodation for Countryside Holiday
groups.desc:
Questions 1-10
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect: Holiday Details • Preferred location: $1$ • Try to avoid: $2$ • Length of stay: a $3$ Special Requirements • Must be $4$ • A good $5$ for children • A $6$ nearby Additional Requirements • No stairs • Prefer a $7$ instead of a balcony Personal Details • Name: Mrs $8$ • Contact number: $9$ • Source of information: the ads from the Magazine of $10$

questions.title: Prefer a 【   】 instead of a balcony
Source of information: the ads from the Magazine of 【   】

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I've heard that your travel agency provides holidays in the countryside.

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: We've specialized in countryside holidays with many years of experience, so we can ensure that we provide perfect holidays with several destinations.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: My husband and I are planning a countryside holiday with the whole family, and I'm calling just for the accommodation.

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: Where are you going to spend your holiday?

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: There're some excellent accommodations on our list in different destinations.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Well, last year we spent our holiday in the southern part of the city, but this time we'd like to live in the northeast.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I have a friend who's just returned and had great fun there.

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: And what about the time of your holiday?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: It'll be in the first week of September, which we think will be off-peak travel time.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: At peak season, the attractions are always crowded with people, and hotels or restaurants might overcharge you, so we try to avoid that.

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: Yes, arranging your holiday during off-peak time is wise as you can enjoy the attractions and facilities better.

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: Then how long are you going to stay?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Our holiday will last three days, and we will stay there for a weekend.

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: That's the location and time of the holiday.

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: Then let's turn to the accommodation itself.

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: Do you have any particular requirements for housing?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Yes, the first priority we've considered is, of course, a quiet environment so that both young and old can have good rest during our stay.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Then we'd prefer a cottage on a good beach where my children can play with great fun.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: My little daughter loves collecting shells and building sandcastles.

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: It also means secluded nights and fresh sea air.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Oh, another thing is, I'm kind of a foodie, and whenever I visit a new place, I'm always desperate to try the local cuisine.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: So if possible, I'd prefer a good restaurant not far away from where we live.

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: Tasting the local cuisine is one of the delights of the holiday.

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: Then what about the actual room?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Our family has five members, so we'll need a cottage with three living rooms and a separate bathroom with a shower.

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: Three living rooms and a separate bathroom with a shower.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Oh, another important thing is, my father got his backache last week, and climbing stairs might cause trouble.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I'm concerned that he might not recover from it during our holiday, so there shouldn't be any stairs in the cottage, I'm afraid.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Actually, it's not necessary for us, but if possible, we need a garden, you know, where the children can play.

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: Several cottages cater to your need.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Well, that's all our needs for the accommodation.

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: OK, I've written down all the details.

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: And I'll contact you as soon as I find the one which can satisfy your needs.

transcript.speaker: Jack
transcript.en: Before we finish, I'd like to know where you heard about us.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I saw the ads of your travel agency in a magazine called Countryside Living.

1.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 preferred、location，此处应填地点名词或名词短语。
题目解析：本题作为开篇第一题，在一段简短的背景介绍之后，通过男士提问 “Where are you going to spend your holiday?” 可以定位到该题，准备抓取地点信息。女士回答 “… last year we spent our holiday in the southern part of the city, but this time we'd like to live in the northeast”，可以判断 southern part（去年的度假地点）为干扰信息，northeast 为正确答案。

2.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 avoid，此处应填负向信息搭配的名词或动名词短语。
题目解析：本题定位信息不明显。上一题结束后，通过男士提问 “And what about the time of your holiday?” 可以判断话题的切换，并且定位到该题。接着在女士的回答中先后出现 first week、September、off-peak、time 等名词信息，但都未搭配负向信息。继续往下听，听到 “At peak season, the attractions are always crowded with people, and hotels or restaurants might overcharge you, so we try to avoid that.”，其中 avoid that 与题干信息一致，that 指代前文的 peak season，可确认 peak season 为正确答案。

3.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 length、a，此处应填单数名词或名词短语，表示一段时间。
题目解析：上一题结束后，通过男士提问 “Then how long are you going to stay?” 可以定位到该题。先听到女士提及时间信息 three days，但其是复数名词，不符合题干要求，可判断其为干扰信息。继续往下听，听到 we will stay there for a weekend，其中 weekend 符合题干要求，记录下来即可。

4.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 Special Requirements；提示词为 must be，此处应填形容词。
题目解析：上一题结束后，通过男士提问中的 particular requirements 可以定位到该题，准备抓取答案词。女士回答 the first priority we've considered is, of course, a quiet environment，其中 quiet 符合题干要求，记录下来即可。

5.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 a、good、children，此处应填单数名词或名词短语。
题目解析：本题定位信息不明显。上一题结束后，听到女士提到 “Then we'd prefer a cottage on a good beach where my children can play with great fun,”，其中 beach 前后搭配题干的 good 和 children，符合题干要求，记录下来即可。注意，虽然 cottage 的词性和形式符合题干要求，但其前后并未搭配 good 和 children 等题干信息，可判断其为干扰信息。

6.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 a、nearby，此处应填单数名词或名词短语，表示某个地点。
题目解析：本题定位信息也不明显。上一题结束后，听到女士提到 another thing is，可以定位到该题，准备抓取地点信息。女士提到 “… I'd prefer a good restaurant not far away from where we live.”，其中 not far away from 对应题干的 nearby，替换难度不大，可以判断 restaurant 为正确答案。

7.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 no stairs；提示词为 a、instead of、balcony，此处应填单数名词或名词短语。
题目解析：上层信息 no stairs 出现后，可以定位到该题。男士提问 “Do you need a balcony?”，随即被女士否定 “… it's not necessary for us ...”，女士接着提到 we need a garden，可判断 garden 符合题干要求，记录下来即可。

8.analysis:
听前预测：定位词、提示词为 name，此处应填人名，一般会给出字母拼写。
题目解析：本题定位不难，通过男士提问 “What's your surname?” 可以定位到该题，准备抓取答案词。女士回答 “Cheffins, that's C-H-E-double F-I-N-S.”，根据字母拼写记录下来即可。注意 double 这个考点。

9.analysis:
听前预测：定位词、提示词为 contact number，此处应填电话号码。
题目解析：上一题结束后，女士提到 “And my telephone number is 0192477285.”，直接定位并记录数字即可。该串电话号码有 10 位数，需要对数字有一定的敏感度，建议对数字反应较慢的考生进行专项训练。

10.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 ads、magazine；提示词为 magazine、of，此处应填杂志名称，词性无法准确预判。
题目解析：题干中的 ads 和 magazine 原词重现，随后女士提到 “… a magazine called Countryside Living”，可判断该杂志名称为 Countryside Living，记录下来即可。注意，答案词首字母小写也算正确，大小写不影响得分。
